name: Hershey Bar Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate bar pieces and milk in a double boiler over hot (not boiling) water, stirring frequently.
2. Add marshmallows and stir until melted. Remove from heat.
3. Cool mixture to room temperature.
4. Beat whipping cream until stiff. Carefully fold into the chocolate mixture.
5. Spoon into prepared crust. Cover and refrigerate until firm, about 4 hours.
6. Garnish with whipped cream or cherry pie filling, if desired. Cover and refrigerate leftover pie.
Chocolate Petal Crust:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter, sugar, egg, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
4. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt; add to butter mixture.
5. Shape the dough into two rolls, 1-1/2 inches in diameter.
6. Cut one roll into 1/8-inch slices and arrange on bottom and up side of pie plate (small spaces will not affect the crust).
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes. Cool completely.
Note: The remaining roll of dough may be frozen for later use.
